title: The Straw Hats Inside a Giant Mystery
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Nami, Franky, Zoro, Unknown person #14, Luffy as The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.
scene: The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's been two days since the giant warrior pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even with the sailing speed of the great Erik...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ...they have yet to arrive at Elbaf.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Did we all pass out drunk?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've got to find them! We can't head to Elbaf like this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Maybe they were swallowed by a fish.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quit it!! The fish here are so massive, that just might be true!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ooh... I must've had too much to drink...

summary: This part advances the Arrival in Elbaf through 17 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
